heading: Production, receipt, removal, and use of distilling materials
label: 5222 Production, receipt, removal, and use of distilling materials

children.text: No mash, wort, or wash fit for distillation or for the production of distilled spirits shall be made or fermented in any building or on any premises other than on the bonded premises of a distilled spirits plant duly authorized to produce distilled spirits according to law; and no mash, wort, or wash so made or fermented shall be removed from any such premises before being distilled, except as authorized by the Secretary; and no person other than an authorized distiller shall, by distillation or any other process, produce distilled spirits from any mash, wort, wash, or other material.

children.label: A
children.text: authorized operations performed on the premises of vinegar plants established under part I of subchapter H;

children.label: B
children.text: authorized production and removal of fermented materials produced on authorized brewery or bonded wine cellar premises as provided by law;

children.label: C
children.text: products exempt from tax under the provisions of section 5042 or 5053(e); or

children.label: D
children.text: fermented materials used in the manufacture of vinegar by fermentation.
from the premises of a bonded wine cellar authorized to remove such material by section 5362(c)(6);
beer conveyed without payment of tax from brewery premises, beer which has been lawfully removed from brewery premises upon determination of tax, or
cider exempt from tax under the provisions of section 5042(a)(1).

children.heading: Processing of distilled spirits containing extraneous substances
children.label: c Processing of distilled spirits containing extraneous substances
children.text: The Secretary may by regulations provide for the removal from the distilling system, and the addition to the fermented or unfermented distilling material, of distilled spirits containing substantial quantities of fusel oil or aldehydes, or other extraneous substances.

children.heading: Penalty
children.label: d Penalty
children.text: For penalty and forfeiture for unlawful production, removal, or use of material fit for distillation or for the production of distilled spirits, and for penalty and forfeiture for unlawful production of distilled spirits, see sections 5601(a)(7), 5601(a)(8), and 5615(4).
